message:
refactor(websocket): apply VecDeque pong optimization to server and split

Follow-up to the client-side VecDeque migration: apply the same
Vec→VecDeque change to ServerWebSocket and the split WebSocket
shared state. Replaces O(n) remove(0) with O(1) pop_front() and
push() with push_back() for consistent FIFO pong dispatch across
all WebSocket implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
